title: Report
description: A Campaign Manager 360 report configuration. Reports provide performance data and analytics for campaigns, ads, placements, and other advertising dimensions.

ownerProfileId.description: The user profile ID of the owner of this report.

accountId.description: The account ID this report belongs to.

subAccountId.description: The subaccount ID this report belongs to.

fileName.description: The filename used when generating report files for this report.

format.description: The output format of the report.

lastModifiedTime.description: The timestamp (in milliseconds since epoch) of when this report was last modified.

kind.description: Identifies what kind of resource this is. Value is always dfareporting#report.
